Private yacht journeys across Bali, curated for quiet luxury, clear water, and moments worth keeping.

Popular Journeys

Explore Bali's most requested private yacht routes

Cinematic route pages built to sell the experience first, then move qualified guests into booking.

Nusa Penida

A scenic full-day yacht escape toward cliffs, blue water, and photogenic island stops.

Base priceFrom Rp18.500.000
Duration1 Day Trip
More Details →
Ideal forCouples, families, content trips
TransportPrivate Yacht
Nusa Dua

A smoother coastal charter for sunset, intimate celebrations, and relaxed onboard moments.

Base priceFrom Rp12.500.000
Duration3-4 Hours
More Details →
Ideal forSunset, proposal, birthday
TransportPrivate Yacht
Gili Trawangan

A longer blue-water escape for guests seeking a more adventurous private yacht route.

Base priceCustom Quote
DurationFull Day / Custom
More Details →
Ideal forGroups, adventure, island escape
TransportPrivate Yacht
Uluwatu

Dramatic clifftop temples, surf breaks, and the best sunset views in southern Bali.

Base priceFrom Rp14.500.000
Duration5-6 Hours
More Details →
Ideal forSunset lovers, photographers, surfers
TransportPrivate Yacht

Fast Support

Flexible Plans

Global Reach

Journal
